## Docs

- [About John](/about): Hello, I'm John Whitton.

- [Get started](/getting-started): Hello world!
- [Resume and Career Highlights](/resume): Choose the resume that best matches the role. Each version presents the same career through a different technical or leadership lens while highlighting the most relevant experience for that audience.
- [Executive Summary](/resume): **Engineer. Architect. Leader.**
- [Career Snapshot](/resume): Built Rust-based trading infrastructure evaluating 1,100+ routes/sec
- [Professional Experience](/resume): Built Rust-based trading infrastructure evaluating 1,100+ routes/sec
- [Education](/resume): Built Rust-based trading infrastructure evaluating 1,100+ routes/sec
- [Testimonials & References](/references/intro): I have been fortunate to work with exceptional engineers, architects, researchers, founders, and leaders throughout my career.
